description_short: Crafted from 100% long-staple cotton with a refined sateen weave, these fitted sheets deliver a buttery-soft feel, subtle luster, and breathable comfort.

cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Machine wash in cold water with mild detergents. Do not bleach. Can be ironed.

proprietary_tech.name: 360° Elastic
proprietary_tech.description: Elastic runs all around the sheet, grips mattresses up to 10–13 inches thick.

faq_specs.question: Why should I choose a sateen fitted bedsheet over other fabrics?
faq_specs.answer: Sateen offers a smoother, softer feel with a subtle sheen compared to percale's crisp texture or microfiber's synthetic feel.

faq_specs.question: Is this fitted bedsheet suitable for thick mattresses?
faq_specs.answer: Yes, it is designed with a deep pocket and can comfortably fit mattresses up to 10–13 inches thick, depending on the size.

faq_specs.question: Does this bedsheet come with pillowcases?
faq_specs.answer: Yes. Single and Double sizes come with 1 pillowcase, while Queen and King sizes come with 2 pillowcases.

notes_observed: Flat ₹1599 across all sizes. Pocket depth (height_mm) = 330mm = ~13".
